creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Complete ChangeLog: http://foo-projects.org/pipermail/xfce/2010-December/028011.html

- Use XFCE master site macro, instead of one mirror.
- Clean pkg-plist file, remove 'locale' pathes which are already present in Templates/BSD.local.dist

Note: this package was tested under Xfce 4.8pre2 (the next stable version of Xfce4).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
